name: Butterfly Crunch
image_match: Crunches — a butterfly crunch is a crunch performed with soles together and knees dropped out. yuhonas has no butterfly-specific entry (Butterfly_Stretch 404'd and is a stretch, not a crunch); Crunches (HTTP 200) is the closest crunch illustration.
form_cues: Soles together, knees dropped out wide
Crunch the rib cage toward the pelvis
notes: Phase 1 PT core move — soles together, knees out.
instructions: Lie on your back, bring the soles of your feet together and let your knees fall open.
Place hands behind the head or across the chest.
Crunch up, lifting the shoulder blades off the floor and contracting the abs.
